generator_notes.temporary_script: Node.js one-shot using git ls-tree, git log --follow --find-renames=40% --numstat per current file, git log --since name-only for coupling, git blame -w -M -C -C for top hotspots, raw git log --no-renames --numstat, and git log --find-renames=40% --name-status for renames.
